audit_score_notes: Points deducted: (1) hero image not fetched — fallback_needed flag set (-6); (2) full § 181.723 14-factor list not individually enumerated in the table (table shows 8 representative factors with note; full statutory list is provisional) (-4); (3) no Colorado worker-classification page confirmed live at time of writing — cross-state link may be dead (-2). Core statutory framing, penalty figures, expansion date, and enforcement structure all verified against cache. Schema full stack. All CTAs canonical.

high_concern_flags.detail: Compliance cache confirms: 14 factors effective 1 March 2025, penalty up to $10,000 per worker. Full enumeration of all 14 factors not verified against primary statutory text (Minn. Stat. § 181.723, subd. 4) during generation. Page table shows 8 representative factors. Before publishing, verify all 14 factors against https://www.revisor.mn.gov/statutes/cite/181.723 and expand the table if material factors are missing.
high_concern_flags.action: Read Minn. Stat. § 181.723, subd. 4 in full. Add any factors not currently represented in the table.

high_concern_flags.action: Read Minn. Stat. § 181.722, subd. 3 in full. Confirm factor descriptions match statutory language.
